name: MEYE pupil segmentation
short_description: Default pupil mask and blink classification.
description: A model for interspecies pupil segmentation, blink classification, and extraction of frame-level pupil measurements from eye-facing camera recordings.
output: Pupil mask, eye probability, blink probability
recommended_use: Offline/Online pupillometry, quality-control videos, and frame-level pupil analysis

performance.Tested acquisition rate: >20 fps or higher with GPU support
performance.Validated paradigms: PLR, pupil frequency tagging, auditory oddball, commercial eye-tracker comparison

notes: Released in 2022-01-24 - Reference
